description: Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list, this striking pair of sandals is the right choice for the summer with its sunset hues and stylish ankle strap looping elegantly around your ankle. enroute's Spring Summer collection includes this endlessly versatile piece - a definite eye candy, which looks enviously good with ethnic and casual western wear! Upper Dyed leather upper with criss-crossing leather strips that act as a toe box and heel cup Ankle strap with a buckle closure Lightly padded footbed with a brand patch at the heel Outsole TPU textured outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
